extraction.Decision Title: Decision on organizing and guiding the implementation of national defense education in universities and colleges

Key Points.Point: Establishment of national defense education centers at universities and colleges
Key Points.Details: These centers will be responsible for organizing and implementing national defense education.

Key Points.Point: Appointment of military officers to teach national defense subjects
Key Points.Details: Military officers will be assigned by the Ministry of National Defense (MoND) to teach national defense subjects at these centers.

Key Points.Point: Regulation on curriculum and teaching materials
Key Points.Details: The MoND, Ministry of Education and Training, and Ministry of Public Security are responsible for developing and updating curricula and teaching materials for national defense education.

Details: Ministry of National Defense: Overall coordination and management.
Ministry of Education and Training: Coordination with the Ministry of National Defense, Ministry of Public Security, etc. to develop policies for national defense education teachers.
Ministry of Public Security: Cooperation with the Ministry of National Defense and other relevant departments to develop curricula and teaching materials.
The government will provide financial support, including funding for infrastructure development, equipment, and teaching resources.
Local governments are responsible for providing land and ensuring the necessary facilities for these centers.

Implementation Steps.Step: Developing a national defense education curriculum
Implementation Steps.Details: This will involve collaboration between the Ministry of National Defense, Ministry of Education and Training, and Ministry of Public Security.

Implementation Steps.Step: Establishment of centers at universities and colleges
Implementation Steps.Details: These centers will be set up to provide national defense education for students.
Military officers will undergo training to teach national defense subjects effectively.
Regular monitoring and evaluation of the implementation of national defense education programs will be conducted by relevant authorities.
